_doc: PF (Preflight HTML) regression test cases for STATIC rules only. Each case has an HTML snippet that feeds into the corresponding checkPF* function. type: true_positive = should detect, false_positive = should NOT detect. expectedLevel: 'ERROR'|'WARN'|null. status: 'known_issue' = code doesn't match desired behavior (tracked for future fix).

cases.description: linear-gradient on div with white text — text invisible in PPTX

input.html: Title text

cases.description: radial-gradient with bright #fff text color

cases.source: IL-14 — radial-gradient + rgb() text with spaces
cases.description: radial-gradient with rgb(255, 255, 255) — color extraction regex fails on spaced rgb()
cases._known_issue: PF-01 color regex [^;"'\s]+ breaks on rgb(R, G, B) with spaces. Only #hex and rgb(R,G,B) without spaces work.

img with height:100% AND max-height — safe pattern

Inline rgba background-color with alpha 0.3
rgba with alpha 0 — fully transparent, no issue
rgba with alpha 1.0 — fully opaque, same as solid color

cases.description: Image in assets/ with 'chart' in filename — likely fake data

cases.description: Image with 'infographic' in alt text — AI fake data risk

cases.source: synthetic — assets image without banned keywords
cases.description: Normal photo in assets/ — no chart/graph keywords
External image with chart keyword — not in assets/, should be skipped
letter-spacing: 2pt — ignored in PPTX, text width differs
letter-spacing: 0.5pt — within +-1pt threshold
opacity: 0.5 — ignored in PPTX, renders fully opaque
opacity in <style> block — ignored in PPTX
opacity: 1.0 — no transparency, no issue
opacity on <body> — skipped by body check
object-fit: cover — PPTX converts to contain mode
object-fit: contain — this is the PPTX default, no issue
outline: 2pt solid — ignored in PPTX
outline: none — explicitly none, should not trigger
outline: 0 — zero value, should not trigger
margin-top: -10pt — PPTX positioning may differ
margin-top: -3pt — within acceptable range
text-indent: 20pt — ignored in PPTX
text-indent: 0 — no indent, should not trigger
word-break: break-all — ignored in PPTX
word-break: normal — default behavior, should not trigger
column-count: 2 — CSS columns not supported in PPTX

First column text.

Second column text.

cases.description: column-count: 1 — single column, no issue
grid-template-columns contains 'columns' but is not column-count
mix-blend-mode: multiply — ignored in PPTX
mix-blend-mode: normal — default, no issue
border-image — not supported in PPTX
border-image: none — explicitly none, but regex (?!none) lookahead fails after \s* backtracking
cases._known_issue: PF-50 regex /border-image(?:-source)?\s*:\s*(?!none)/ — the \s* before (?!none) can match 0 chars, making lookahead see space not 'none'. Needs \s+ or anchor fix.

cases.description: position: sticky — treated as absolute in PPTX
position: absolute — not sticky, should not trigger
@font-face custom font — PPTX uses system fonts
No @font-face declaration — system fonts only
direction: rtl — PPTX may not respect RTL
direction: ltr — default direction, no issue
white-space: pre — PPTX whitespace handling differs
white-space: pre-line — PPTX line-break handling differs
white-space: normal — default, should not trigger
white-space: nowrap — different property, should not trigger PF-54
span with background:#E4002B + color:#FFF — PPTX strips span bg, white text invisible

cases.source: synthetic — span background-color without explicit text color
cases.description: span with background-color but no explicit color — bg still stripped
span with background: none — should not trigger but regex (?!none) lookahead fails
cases._known_issue: PF-55 regex (?!none|transparent) lookahead doesn't properly exclude 'none' due to \s* backtracking in the background match. Same class of bug as PF-50.

cases.description: span with background: transparent — should not trigger but regex lookahead fails

cases.source: synthetic — span with only color (no background)
cases.description: Span with only color styling — no background at all, should not trigger

Image container uses CSS class that defines height — should not warn

Image with width 240pt — normal size, should not warn
External image with small width — should be ignored (only assets/ checked)

cases.description: Image references nonexistent file in assets/
